description: Data taken on 20260326_152815 of a backlit 5um pinhole at optimal focus position with max intensity 248/255. This experiment measures pixel shift of a pinhole image as a function of XPR tilt angle. A 3x3 grid of positions is visited at each tilt value: (-dx,+dy), (0,+dy), (+dx,+dy), (-dx,0), (0,0), (+dx,0), (-dx,-dy), (0,-dy), (+dx,-dy). Position (0,0) is the reference. X and Y axes are swept independently. Sub-pixel center is found via 2D Gaussian PSF fit.
